place: Millionaire's Mile, Kamala, Kathu, Phuket, Thailand
title: The Aquila — Clifftop Estate, Millionaire's Mile
blurb: A secluded clifftop estate on Kamala's Millionaire's Mile — contemporary Asian design over a 12-bedroom retreat with two ocean-view infinity pools, direct sea access, a cinema, library, gym and spa, served by ten staff for up to 24 guests.
detail:
Perched on a secluded clifftop along Phuket's illustrious Millionaire's Mile in Kamala, The Aquila Villa is a masterpiece of luxury, seamlessly blending contemporary Asian sophistication with nature's raw beauty. Designed for discerning travellers seeking exclusivity and indulgence, this expansive 12-bedroom retreat offers an unparalleled escape in one of Thailand's most coveted destinations.

Set within an extensive estate, the villa strikes a perfect balance between indoor elegance and outdoor serenity. Two infinity pools invite guests to soak in uninterrupted ocean views, surrounded by sun-drenched terraces, alfresco dining spaces and a tranquil outdoor sala. Every detail is meticulously crafted, with twelve private bedrooms including a magnificent master suite designed as a sanctuary of its own and a family room with two adjoined bedrooms.

Beyond its setting, the villa is a haven of world-class amenities: a chic outdoor bar, a cinema room, a library, and an entertainment area with a pool table. Fitness and wellness enthusiasts enjoy a state-of-the-art gym, a dedicated spa room and direct sea access for a swim in the Andaman. Culinary excellence is effortless with a professional kitchen, wine cellar and BBQ facilities served by a private chef — all within a gated estate with 24-hour security, an elevator and a conference area.
